response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes all appear across multiple roles. His current position at re:cinq explicitly covers AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly satisfying the AI agent development requirement. The main gaps are the absence of Nest.js and Vitest by name, no explicit mention of Kotlin, and PostgreSQL not appearing in his database history. These are learnable gaps for a candidate at this seniority level, and his breadth across languages, platforms, and paradigms (TDD, trunk-based dev, CI/CD) indicates he adapts quickly.
strengths: Direct AI agent and MCP framework experience at re:cinq, satisfying the most specialized requirement on the JD
Consistent TypeScript/Node.js/React trajectory across Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and re:cinq, with AWS CDK and MongoDB — covers most of the primary and database stack
Polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, DLang, C++, PHP, Swift) plus hands-on Docker and Kubernetes, demonstrating breadth beyond any single stack
concerns: Nest.js is never mentioned despite being a primary stack requirement; unclear whether exposure exists at re:cinq or needs to be built from scratch
Specific testing frameworks (Vitest, Playwright, Jest) are absent from the resume; TDD culture is evident but framework-level proficiency is unverified
Kotlin is listed as a secondary requirement but does not appear anywhere in the resume; Java appears but only in embedded/robotic contexts, not modern JVM services

key_factors.factor: Nest.js and Vitest absent from record
